text:
LONG NAME: PHRMCY_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 
183500000X: Pharmacist 
1835C0205X: Pharmacist — critical care 
1835C0206X: Cardiology pharmacist 
1835C0207X: Compounded sterile preparations pharmacist 
1835E0208X: Emergency medicine pharmacist 
1835G0000X: Pharmacist — general
